---
title: "Frameworks Multi-Agents"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Frameworks Multi-Agents

## LangGraph (LangChain)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Stars | 10K+ |
| Paradigme | Directed graphs (state machine) |

**Features** : Stateful agents, cycles, human-in-the-loop, streaming, checkpointing, sub-graphs, parallel execution.

```python
from langgraph.graph import StateGraph, END

graph = StateGraph(AgentState)
graph.add_node("planner", plan_step)
graph.add_node("executor", execute_step)
graph.add_node("reviewer", review_step)

graph.add_edge("planner", "executor")
graph.add_conditional_edges("executor", should_review, {
    True: "reviewer", False: END
})
graph.add_conditional_edges("reviewer", is_good, {
    True: END, False: "planner"
})
```

## CrewAI

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Stars | 25K+ |
| Paradigme | Role-based crews |

**Features** : Role-based agents (researcher, writer, reviewer), tasks, processes (sequential, hierarchical), tools, memory.

```python
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew

researcher = Agent(
    role="Researcher",
    goal="Find information",
    backstory="Expert researcher",
    tools=[search_tool]
)

writer = Agent(
    role="Writer",
    goal="Write a report",
    backstory="Technical writer"
)

crew = Crew(
    agents=[researcher, writer],
    tasks=[research_task, write_task],
    process=Process.sequential
)
```

## AutoGen (Microsoft)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/microsoft/autogen` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Stars | 35K+ |
| Paradigme | Conversational multi-agent |

**Features** : Conversational agents, GroupChat, code execution, human proxy, nested chats.

## OpenAI Swarm

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/openai/swarm` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Paradigme | Lightweight handoff |

**Features** : Ultra-léger, routing via handoffs, pas de state management, educational framework.

## Comparatif

| Framework | Paradigme | Stateful | Streaming | Human-in-loop | Complexité | Production |
|-----------|-----------|----------|-----------|---------------|------------|------------|
| LangGraph | Graph | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Moyenne | ✅ |
| CrewAI | Roles | ✅ | ⚠️ | ✅ | Faible | ✅ |
| AutoGen | Conversation | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Moyenne | ✅ |
| Swarm | Handoff | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | Très faible | ❌ (educational) |

::: callout-tip
## Choix framework
- **LangGraph** — Best pour workflows complexes avec cycles et conditions
- **CrewAI** — Best pour teams d'agents avec rôles définis (simple, rapide)
- **AutoGen** — Best pour conversations multi-agent avec code execution
- **Swarm** — Best pour apprendre les concepts (pas production)
:::

## Frameworks découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_FRAMEWORK_START -->
### [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw)
Open-source AI agent framework that turns LLMs into persistent, proactive personal AI agents with multi-channel messaging (Signal, Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp), cron scheduling, memory systems, MCP...

⭐ 383.6k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai`, `assistant`, `crustacean`, `molty`, `openclaw`, `own-your-data`, `personal`

### [hermes-agent](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent)
The agent that grows with you

⭐ 217.7k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `anthropic`, `chatgpt`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `clawdbot`

### [OpenCode](https://github.com/sst/opencode)
The AI coding agent built for the terminal. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 187.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20

### [Paperclip](https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip)
Open-source platform to run coding agents as managed workers with tasks, approvals, budgets, and workspaces. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 74.3k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20

### [Front-End-Checklist](https://github.com/thedaviddias/Front-End-Checklist)
🗂 The essential checklist for modern web development, for humans and AI agents

⭐ 73.3k | `MDX` | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `checklist`, `css`, `front-end-developer-tool`, `front-end-development`, `frontend`, `guidelines`

### [learn-claude-code](https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code)
Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

⭐ 71.7k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent`, `agent-development`, `ai-agent`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `educational`, `llm`, `python`

### [MetaGPT](https://github.com/geekan/MetaGPT)
🌟 The Multi-Agent Framework: First AI Software Company, Towards Natural Language Programming

⭐ 69.4k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent`, `gpt`, `llm`, `metagpt`, `multi-agent`

### [open-interpreter](https://github.com/KillianLucas/open-interpreter)
A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3

⭐ 66.9k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `acp`, `coding-agent`, `deepseek`, `kimi`, `qwen`, `rust`

### [Cline](https://github.com/cline/cline)
Open-source AI coding agent giving developers direct access to frontier models with full transparency. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 64.9k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20

### [career-ops](https://github.com/santifer/career-ops)
Open-source AI job search: scan job portals, score listings A-F, tailor your CV, track applications — runs locally in your AI coding CLI (Claude Code, Gemini, Codex, OpenCode…)

⭐ 60.7k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `anthropic`, `ats`, `automation`, `beginner-friendly`, `career`, `careerops`

### [Autogen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen)
Enable Next-Gen Large Language Model Applications. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 59.8k | `Python` | Licence: CC-BY-4.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agentic`, `agentic-agi`, `agents`, `ai`, `autogen`, `autogen-ecosystem`, `chatgpt`, `framework`

### [Agent-Reach](https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach)
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

⭐ 58.7k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent-infrastructure`, `ai-agent`, `ai-search`, `automation`, `bilibili`, `claude-code`, `cli`, `cursor`

### [daily_stock_analysis](https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis)
LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost...

⭐ 58.0k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `a-stock`, `ai-agent`, `aigc`, `llm`, `quant`, `quantitative-finance`, `quantitative-trading`

### [crewai](https://github.com/joaomdmoura/crewai)
Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.

⭐ 55.9k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `aiagentframework`, `llms`

### [cherry-studio](https://github.com/CherryHQ/cherry-studio)
AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

⭐ 48.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: AGPL-3.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent-skills`, `ai-agent`, `awesome-skills`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `deepseek`, `hermes-agent`, `openclaw`

### [Aider](https://github.com/Aider-AI/aider)
aider is AI pair programming in your terminal !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 47.5k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `anthropic`, `chatgpt`, `claude-3`, `cli`, `command-line`, `gemini`, `gpt-3`, `gpt-35-turbo`

### [CowAgent](https://github.com/zhayujie/CowAgent)
Open-source super AI assistant & Agent Harness. Plans tasks, runs tools and skills, self-evolves with memory and knowledge. Multi-model, multi-channel. Lightweight, extensible, one-line install. (f...

⭐ 46.1k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `chatgpt-on-wechat`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `cowagent`

### [nanobot](https://github.com/HKUDS/nanobot)
Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows.

⭐ 45.9k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `anthropic`, `chatgpt`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `codex`

### [siyuan](https://github.com/siyuan-note/siyuan)
A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

⭐ 45.3k | `TypeScript` | Licence: AGPL-3.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `ai-agent`, `digital-garden`, `electron`, `knowledge-base`, `knowledge-graph`, `local-first`, `markdown`

### [Phidata](https://github.com/phidatahq/phidata)
Build AI Assistants with memory, knowledge and tools. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 41.3k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `developer-tools`, `python`

### [ppt-master](https://github.com/hugohe3/ppt-master)
AI turns documents or topics into real, native PowerPoint decks—with native shapes, transitions and animations, data-backed charts and tables on demand, audio narration from speaker notes, and supp...

⭐ 40.1k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai-agent`, `aippt`, `office`, `powerpoint`, `powerpoint-generation`, `ppt`, `pptx`, `presentation`

### [DSPy](https://github.com/stanfordnlp/dspy)
The framework for programming—not prompting—foundation models !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 36.3k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20

### [CopilotKit](https://github.com/CopilotKit/CopilotKit)
The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React, Angular, Mobile, Slack, and more. Makers of the AG-UI Protocol

⭐ 36.2k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent`, `agent-native`, `agentic-ai`, `agents`, `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-assistant`, `assistant`

### [continue](https://github.com/continuedev/continue)
open-source coding agent

⭐ 35.0k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `cli`, `developer-tools`, `open-source`

### [ChatDev](https://github.com/OpenBMB/ChatDev)
ChatDev 2.0: Dev All through LLM-powered Multi-Agent Collaboration

⭐ 33.8k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20

### [GitHub (Issue Only)](https://github.com/getcursor/cursor)

⭐ 33.1k | MAJ: 2026-07-20

### [AionUi](https://github.com/iOfficeAI/AionUi)
Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app for OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI and 20+ more CLI | Customize your assistants | Star if you like it!

⭐ 30.5k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `acp`, `agent-team`, `ai`, `ai-agent`, `chat`, `chatbot`, `claude-code`, `clawdbot`

### [openclaude](https://github.com/Gitlawb/openclaude)
runs anywhere. uses anything

⭐ 30.2k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-tools`, `cli`, `coding`

### [Storm](https://github.com/stanford-oval/storm)
An LLM-powered knowledge curation system that researches a topic and generates a full-length report with citations. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 30.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agentic-rag`, `deep-research`, `emnlp2024`, `knowledge-curation`, `large-language-models`, `naacl`, `nlp`, `report-generation`

### [cli](https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli)
Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.

⭐ 29.9k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `agent-skills`, `ai-agent`, `automation`, `cli`, `discovery-api`, `gemini-cli-extension`, `google-admin`, `google-api`

<!-- TOOLS_FRAMEWORK_END -->
